## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the situation where you'd want this. "I'm trying to do X but the app doesn't ___." -->

## Suggested solution

<!-- Optional. If you have an idea for how it could work, describe it. Sketches welcome. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Optional. Workarounds you tried, or other approaches that could solve the same problem. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Related issues, screenshots from other apps that do this well, willingness to test a beta, etc. -->

---

> **A note from the maintainer:** Wean Nicotine is a small solo-built app, so feature requests get prioritised against the time available. Honest "no" or "not right now" answers are normal — they're not a judgement of the idea. The honest path is always preferred over making vague promises. Thank you for taking the time to suggest this.
